query:
UPDATE cpa_projects 
SET 
  bua_sqft = 835000,
  construction_cost_per_sqft = 340.0,
  duration_months = 30,
  project_name = 'مجان متعدد الاستخدامات (G+4P+25)'
WHERE id = 30004;
